overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a sunny waterfront plaza with a central fountain, walking past pedestrians and descending onto a wooden dock with boats. The scene transitions from a paved urban plaza to a waterfront promenade and finally to a wooden pier, with a mix of modern skyscrapers and industrial architecture visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront plaza with central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking in a circular path around the fountain, observing the surroundings and other pedestrians in the plaza

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking past the fountain
woman in white dress walking away from the fountain

entered.detail: large circular tiered fountain with water jets and brick surround
large brick building with curved roof and tall windows facing the plaza
tall white modern skyscraper with vertical striping visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks in a circular path around a central fountain in a sunlit waterfront plaza. Other pedestrians stroll through the area while the camera captures views of a large brick building and a distant modern skyscraper. The paved plaza is spacious with scattered trees and street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with benches and trees

events.description: exits the fountain plaza and enters the waterfront promenade along the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path, passing benches and trees while moving away from the fountain

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: metal railing along the water's edge separating the walkway from the harbor
red metal truss bridge spanning the water in the background

segments.scene_description: Leaving the fountain behind, the character proceeds along a waterfront promenade lined with trees and benches. The path runs parallel to the water with a metal railing on the left, while the large brick building recedes into the background. A distinctive red truss bridge becomes visible in the distance across the water.

events.description: descends wooden ramp onto the dock, transitioning from paved stone to wooden planks
slows pace while approaching the end of the wooden pier

agents.ego_description: walking down the wooden ramp onto the dock, then proceeding along the narrow pier between moored boats

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a narrow pier extending over the water
blue and white motorboat moored alongside the dock with covered seating

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wooden ramp onto a narrow dock extending over the water, leaving the paved promenade behind. The wooden planks creak as the character walks between moored boats, including a distinctive blue motorboat. The red truss bridge remains visible to the left while industrial buildings line the distant shore across the calm water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bustling urban plaza into a quiet, industrial waterfront. It begins by circling a central fountain in a sunlit paved square, moving past pedestrians and street lamps with a large brick building and a modern skyscraper framing the view. As the character leaves the fountain, the scene shifts to a tree-lined promenade where the paved path runs parallel to the water, bringing a distant red truss bridge into view. The camera then follows a descent down a wooden ramp, leaving the promenade behind to move onto a narrow dock. Finally, the perspective glides between moored boats, including a blue motorboat, while the red bridge and distant industrial buildings line the horizon across the calm water.
